PROTOCOL_INVALID_JSON: Input is not one complete JSON object.
PROTOCOL_INVALID_ENVELOPE: Required envelope fields are missing or invalid.
PROTOCOL_VERSION_MISMATCH: Desktop and Core protocol versions are incompatible.
PROTOCOL_UNKNOWN_TYPE: The request type is not registered.
PROTOCOL_DUPLICATE_REQUEST: The request id has already been used.
CORE_START_FAILED: The Core process could not be started.
CORE_EXITED: The Core process exited before the request completed.
REQUEST_TIMEOUT: The request exceeded its configured timeout.
CAPABILITY_UNSUPPORTED: The Core does not advertise the requested capability.
INTERNAL_ERROR: The Core failed without exposing sensitive details.
